description: Phase 8 golden bundle — expectations after merge → buildCanonicalImportEvents → aggregateCanonicalEventsToLedgerDriverOverview. NOTE: Fare-related statement_line events (TOTAL_EARNINGS, NET_FARE, PROMOTIONS, TIPS, REFUNDS_EXPENSES) are NO LONGER emitted from import; fares come from trip-level fare_earning/tip/promotion events. periodEarnings now only includes toll_support_adjustment/dispute_refund amounts.
